serverInfo.name: Mifos X Self-Service MCP Server
serverInfo.description: MCP server for the Apache Fineract / Mifos X Self-Service API. Provides 57 AI-callable tools for mobile banking workflows including authentication, client management, loans, savings, beneficiaries, transfers, guarantors, shares, and notifications.

authentication.description: Authentication is handled per-tool via Fineract self-service credentials (username/password) passed as tool parameters.

MIFOS_BASE_URL.description: Base URL of the Fineract instance

MIFOS_TENANT.description: Tenant identifier for multi-tenant Fineract deployments
